subject: fix(security): add api.mapbox.com to CSP style-src
body:
The Mapbox GL CSS stylesheet is loaded from api.mapbox.com but
style-src only allowed 'self' and 'unsafe-inline'. This would
cause the browser to block the stylesheet, breaking map rendering.

Pre-existing issue (same CSP was in the meta tag), but now caught
during review of the header migration.

Tags: security, pwa, fix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-alignment
Semver: patch
